basic_details.short_information: ICMR National Institute for Implementation Research (ICMR NIIRNCD) Project Technical Support - III Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of ICMR NIIRNCD. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICMR NIIRNCD Project Technical Support - III Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per ICMR / Central Government / DoPT norms for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD/Ex-servicemen etc.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics / Life Sciences with three years post-qualification experience, Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics/Life Sciences
qualification.details: Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics / Life Sciences with three years post-qualification experience OR Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics / Life Sciences.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Written Test (if >30 candidates) Skill Test (wherever applicable) Document Verification

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ICMR NIIRNCD Project Technical Support - III Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICMR NIIRNCD Project Technical Support - III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICMR NIIRNCD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held on 14 July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete the registration formalities.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for which ICMR NIIRNCD is recruiting?
faq.answer: ICMR NIIRNCD is recruiting for the post of Project Technical Support - III.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support - III post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technical Support - III post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technical Support - III post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics / Life Sciences with three years of post-qualification experience, or a Post Graduate Degree in the same fields.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support - III post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Technical Support - III post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support - III position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 28,000/- plus HRA per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Technical Support - III post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview, and if more than 30 candidates appear, a Written Test will be conducted, followed by a Skill Test (if applicable) and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at ICMR National Institute for Implementation Research, Jodhpur, Rajasthan, 342005.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICMR NIIRNCD Recruitment 2026?
